title: truth-delivered.schema.json Authoring — Greenfield
description: Authors schemas/truth-delivered.schema.json as schema-bound closure record for deliverables. Per memory #19 no-md-terminus: closure records must be schema-bound, not prose-only. Fields per FU-TRUTH-DELIVERED-SCHEMA-1 body (EB register): deliverableId, deliveredAt, lifecycleState, closureStatus, authority block, outputs[] with mergeCommit/prNumber/ciResult/ciFailure, closureNotes, relatedFollowUps[], rulePipelineEvidence[], transitions[]. Applies forbidden-audit-paint-names constraint via allOf for parity with rule.schema.json + deliverable.schema.json. Greenfield authoring per substrate read part 2 (no pre-existing artifact in either repo).

acceptanceCriteria: All EB FU body fields represented
Positive test: minimal valid instance accepted
Negative test: instance with 'override' field rejected

outputs.description: schema-refs.json regenerated via luhtech-schema refs rebuild. New .schemas.truth-delivered entry; changelog appended.
Deliverable spec instance — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 post-merge amendment.

preMerge: Substrate baseline (Step 1): no pre-existing truth-delivered artifact in either repo
Schema compiles as Draft 7 (with -r forbidden-audit-paint-names ref)
Positive test: minimal valid instance accepted
Negative test: 'override' field rejected via allOf
Deliverable spec validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
postMerge: EB-agent can now author TRUTH-DELIVERED instances for closure records

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-5b close (3e66e5a). Greenfield per substrate read part 2 confirmation.

notes: Second cross-repo coordination deliverable in FU block. Closes one EB-side FU (FU-TRUTH-DELIVERED-SCHEMA-1). Direct close per Erik direction 2026-06-01 — no pre-merge EB-agent review. EB-agent can amend schema shape via subsequent PR if needed. v0 shape derives from EB FU body field list (substrate read part 1 R-2). Schema unblocks EB FU-WAVE-1-CLOSURE-RECORD-1 (P3 blocked) which needs this schema to land its Wave 1 closure record instance.
